master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “A Última Cena”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set inside a stately old theatre, the Teatro Municipal, during the final dress rehearsal of a play called “A Rainha Envenenada”, after the celebrated lead actor collapses on stage after drinking from a prop chalice. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, theatrical and atmospheric, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: the Teatro Municipal is a grand historic theatre with heavy deep-burgundy stage curtains, gilded balconies, worn velvet seats, wooden floorboards with tape markings, backstage corridors, mirrors framed by bulb-lit makeup tables, prop tables draped in velvet, candelabra-style sconces, aged playbills, and a sophisticated old-world Brazilian cultural-institution mood. Color palette: deep burgundy #3E0E1A, oxblood velvet #4A1320, faded gold #B8923E, antique brass #8A6A2A, dark mahogany #2E1810, stage-wood brown #3A2418, regency-green backstage wall #2C3A2E, warm amber stage light #C68A3E, pearl cream highlight #F2EBDC, charcoal shadow #2A2024. Lighting: warm amber stage lights, soft directional highlights from candelabra sconces and makeup-table bulbs, deep but elegant burgundy and green shadows, subtle golden reflections on the prop chalice and gilded balconies, gentle depth falloff. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, subtle film grain, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: a metal prop chalice, aged playbills, makeup kits, handwritten cue sheets, draped prop tables, heavy velvet curtains, bulb-framed mirrors, tape markings on stage wood. Avoid horror, gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “A Última Cena”. Show the stage of a grand historic theatre during the final dress rehearsal, viewed from the house. The main focus is the center of the stage: a single metal prop chalice lies on its side on the wooden floorboards, exactly where the celebrated lead actor fell after drinking from it, though the actor himself is absent from the frame. Around the spot, yellow tape markings on the floor indicate actor blocking positions. In the background: heavy deep-burgundy stage curtains, gilded balconies fading into shadow, and warm amber stage lights from above. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the fallen chalice slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side (curtain and shadow) for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the depth of the stage behind the chalice to create atmosphere, with softly blurred balcony details and light beams. No people in the foreground. Mood: theatrical, elegant, inquisitive, quietly dramatic, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “A Última Cena”. Show an ornate metal prop chalice lying tipped on its side on a worn wooden stage floor, a small pool of liquid and a faint oily residue spreading from its mouth. A single yellow tape marking on the floor and a sliver of deep-burgundy curtain anchor the scene in the theatre. Around it: warm amber bokeh from stage lights and a soft golden glint on the chalice's engraving. Composition: square close-up still life, the fallen prop chalice dominates the frame, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between the polished metal and the dark wooden floor. The tipped chalice should remain instantly readable as “something went wrong on this stage” even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: theatrical, quiet, suspicious, elegant, literary.

palco.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Palco”, the main stage of the Teatro Municipal. Show the stage still set for the final scene of “A Rainha Envenenada”. Work lights are on, revealing yellow tape markings on the dark wooden floorboards indicating actor blocking positions, and at center stage the exact spot where the lead actor collapsed after drinking from the chalice. Heavy deep-burgundy curtains frame the sides, gilded balconies fade into the house shadow, and warm amber stage lights cast long soft beams from above. Composition: the empty marked stage is the clear focal point, centered, with enough surrounding theatre context (curtains, balconies, light rig) to establish the location. Mood: theatrical, calm, inquisitive, quietly dramatic. Important visual clues: tape blocking markings on the floor, center-stage collapse spot, burgundy curtains, amber stage light.

camarim_caetano.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Camarim de Caetano”, the private dressing room of the lead actor, at the end of a backstage corridor. Show a bulb-lit makeup vanity with mirrors framed by round warm lights, a wardrobe of costumes, and a cluttered personal table. On the vanity sit jars of stage makeup, a folded medical document tucked near personal medicines, and an aged playbill from thirty years ago propped against the mirror. Warm amber light mixes with deep burgundy and charcoal shadows. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the vanity clearly visible, the aged playbill and the medical document noticeable enough to function as clues, but not overly dramatic. Mood: intimate, private, elegant, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: bulb-framed mirror, aged playbill, folded medical rider, personal medicines, vanity table.

camarim_coletivo.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Camarim coletivo”, the shared dressing room of the ensemble. Show rows of makeup stations with mirrors and personal makeup kits, each station marked with an actor's name. At the back, a costume trunk anchors the room. At one station (Lourenço's), a small dark unlabelled vial sits inside a makeup kit; at another station (Tomás's), a folded anonymous note rests on the surface; and inside the open costume trunk, a bundle of yellowed letters tied with faded ribbon is visible. Regency-green backstage walls, warm amber makeup-bulb light, and deep mahogany shadows. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the shared stations clearly visible, the vial, the note, and the bundled letters noticeable as clues without being overly highlighted. Mood: communal, theatrical, quietly suspicious, ensemble atmosphere. Important visual clues: personal makeup kits with name tags, small dark vial, folded note, yellowed letters in trunk, regency-green walls.

mesa_aderecos.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Mesa de adereços”, the prop table backstage. Show a long velvet-draped table where each stage prop has a marked place. An open hardcover cue book sits at the center with handwritten blocking notes. One marked place on the velvet — clearly labelled for the chalice — sits empty, the prop absent from its expected spot, a small but deliberate anomaly. Warm amber backstage lamp light, deep burgundy velvet, and soft shadows. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the velvet prop table as the clear focal point, the open cue book and the empty marked chalice spot noticeable as clues. Mood: orderly, theatrical, precise, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: velvet-draped prop table, open cue book with handwritten notes, empty marked chalice spot, backstage lamp.

calice.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Cálice de cena”, the central clue of the mystery. Show an ornate aged-metal prop chalice resting on the dark wooden stage floor at the exact spot where the lead actor collapsed. A faint oily residue clings to the inside of the cup and a small dark pool of liquid spreads at its base, hinting at the adulterated contents. The chalice looks like a stage prop: engraved but clearly not real silver, slightly worn from rehearsals. Around it, a yellow tape marking on the floor and the edge of a burgundy curtain appear softly blurred. Warm amber stage light falls across the metal. Composition: close-up still life, the prop chalice dominates the frame, with metal texture, oily residue, and wooden floor grain clearly visible. Mood: theatrical, suspicious, important, quiet absence of its owner.

frasco_oleo.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Frasco de óleo”, a small dark unlabelled vial of cashew-nut oil, found inside Lourenço's personal makeup kit in the shared dressing room. Show a small dark glass vial, unlabelled, stoppered, sitting among jars of stage makeup, sponges, and brushes on a bulb-lit vanity. The vial looks out of place among cosmetic containers: darker, more clinical, clearly personal. The bulb-framed mirror reflects warm amber light, and the edge of a name tag reading “Lourenço” is softly visible. Composition: square close-up still life, the small dark vial is the clear focal point, with makeup-kit context and mirror-bulb bokeh around it. Mood: quiet, suspicious, ordinary-becoming-sinister, investigative. Important visual clues: unlabelled dark vial, stage-makeup kit context, name tag, bulb-framed mirror.

carta_vianna.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Cartas de Vianna”, a bundle of old letters tied with faded ribbon, found in the costume trunk of the shared dressing room. Show several yellowed letters with elegant aged feminine handwriting, folded and bound together by a once-red now-faded ribbon, resting on dark velvet inside an open wooden trunk. Some edges are worn and the ink is sepia with age. The letters feel deeply personal and carefully preserved for decades. Soft amber light falls across the pages, while costume fabric appears blurred around the edges. Composition: square close-up still life, the bundled letters are the clear focal point, with realistic aged-paper texture and legible but old handwriting detail. Mood: intimate, melancholic, important, quietly revelatory. Important visual clues: yellowed letters, faded ribbon, aged feminine handwriting, costume trunk context.

programa_antigo.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Programa antigo”, an aged playbill from a legendary Teatro Municipal production of thirty years ago, found in Caetano's private dressing room. Show a folded printed playbill, yellowed with age, propped against a bulb-lit mirror. The cover features a faded vintage photograph of two co-leads — a celebrated actor and an actress — linking them to the same stage decades ago. Around it: jars of stage makeup and the warm reflection of the vanity bulbs. Composition: square close-up still life, the aged playbill is the clear focal point, with realistic aged-paper texture and a legible vintage cover. Mood: nostalgic, important, quietly revelatory, theatrical. Important visual clues: aged printed playbill, vintage co-lead photograph, yellowed paper, dressing-room vanity context.

rider_medico.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Rider médico de Caetano”, a folded backstage medical document kept in a drawer of the lead actor's private vanity. Show a crisp document with a discreet medical letterhead, folded once, partially pulled from a vanity drawer beside small personal medicines. The text is formal and clinical; it documents a severe allergy, clearly a closely guarded personal secret. Warm amber light from the vanity bulbs falls across the page. Composition: square close-up still life, the folded medical document is the clear focal point, with realistic paper texture and clinical typography. Mood: private, important, quietly suspicious, intimate. Important visual clues: medical letterhead, folded document, personal medicines, vanity drawer context.

caderno_marcacao.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caderno de marcação”, the open cue book on the prop table. Show a hardcover notebook lying open on the velvet-draped prop table, with handwritten blocking notes: scene order, props, responsible actor names, and entrance times in dark pen. One entry clearly references the chalice and the actor who hands it over in the final scene. A backstage lamp casts warm amber light across the page, while the edge of the velvet prop table and a blurred prop appear around it. Composition: square close-up still life, the open cue book is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwritten detail. Mood: orderly, theatrical, investigative, refined. Important visual clues: open hardcover notebook, handwritten blocking notes, chalice entry, velvet prop table context.

bilhete_tomas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Bilhete para Tomás”, an anonymous folded note left on the understudy's station in the shared dressing room. Show a small square of paper, folded once, resting on a modest makeup station marked with the name “Tomás”. The note carries a short handwritten line hinting that the lead actor would be “indisposto” (unwell), suggesting prior planning without naming an author. Around it: a simpler, less cluttered vanity than the leads', warm amber makeup-bulb light, and soft regency-green shadows. Composition: square close-up still life, the folded anonymous note is the clear focal point, with realistic paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: quiet, suspicious, ambiguous, investigative. Important visual clues: folded note, understudy's modest station, name tag, handwritten hint.

ines.prompt: Create a character portrait for Inês Drummond, the guest director of the production, in her debut at the Teatro Municipal. Inês is a Brazilian adult woman in her late 30s. She is ambitious, tense, and articulate; she defends every artistic decision as if her career depends on it — because it does. She had a loud public argument with the lead actor over the blocking of the final scene, and the collapse threatens her own contract. Appearance: refined contemporary director, tailored dark clothing, hair pulled back but slightly undone after a long rehearsal, a lanyard with a badge, a clipboard or rolled script in hand, understated jewelry. Her expression is sharp, focused, defensive, and visibly strained. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the theatre house or backstage softly blurred behind her, with burgundy curtains, amber light, and gilded balcony shadow. She should look human, believable, and professionally cornered rather than villainous. Mood: ambition under pressure, artistic pride, strained composure, fear of loss.

tomas.prompt: Create a character portrait for Tomás Reis, the understudy covering the lead role. Tomás is a Brazilian young adult man in his mid-20s. He is anxious, observant, and insecure, carrying the weight of the world even when nothing is his fault. He watches everything from the wings and studies every blocking note, terrified of being blamed. He is innocent: he received an anonymous note saying the lead would be “indisposto” but never went near the chalice. Appearance: young actor, modest rehearsal clothes (a dark t-shirt and loose trousers), a script tucked under one arm, hair slightly tousled, a lanyard badge. His hands fidget near his pockets; his eyes dart. His expression is earnest, overwhelmed, and trying hard to look calm. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the backstage wings softly blurred behind him, with regency-green walls, amber makeup-light, and the edge of a heavy curtain. He should look human, vulnerable, and wrongly suspect rather than guilty. Mood: nervous innocence, watchfulness, fear of blame, relatable humanity.

murilo.prompt: Create a character portrait for Murilo Antunes, the playwright of “A Rainha Envenenada”. Murilo is a Brazilian adult man in his early 50s. He is articulate, vain, and passionate about the text; he keeps the memory of every old Municipal production like family. He clashed publicly with the lead actor over rewritten lines, but they actually reconciled before the rehearsal. Appearance: refined contemporary author, a tweed or corduroy jacket over a dark shirt, reading glasses pushed up onto his forehead, a leather satchel or bound manuscript in hand, neatly groomed graying hair. His expression is measured, literary, slightly wry, and quietly proud. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the theatre's gilded foyer or backstage softly blurred behind him, with burgundy and gold tones and amber light. He should look sophisticated, believable, and protective of his work rather than threatening. Mood: literary pride, measured composure, theatrical memory, calm defensiveness.

consuelo.prompt: Create a character portrait for Dona Consuelo, the veteran costume mistress of the Teatro Municipal, with thirty years of service. Consuelo is a Brazilian older adult woman in her early 60s. She is discreet, attentive, and maternal with the cast; she sees more than she says and stitches secrets along with the costumes. She knew of the lead actor's hidden allergy through adapted costumes, but never connected it to the crime. Appearance: veteran costume artisan, a measuring tape draped around her neck, small scissors on a lanyard, a dark apron over a refined blouse, silver hair pinned back neatly, reading glasses on a chain. Her expression is calm, observant, warm but guarded, quietly perceptive. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the costume workshop or backstage softly blurred behind her, with regency-green walls, burgundy velvet, and warm amber light. She should look human, dignified, and quietly knowing rather than suspicious. Mood: discreet authority, maternal watchfulness, guarded knowledge, professional calm.

lourenco.prompt: Create a character portrait for Lourenço Vieira, the guest veteran actor returning to the Teatro Municipal after thirty years, in the role of the counsellor who hands the chalice to the lead. Lourenço is a Brazilian adult man in his late 50s. He is contained, ceremonious, and precise; he carries thirty years of absence like a well-dressed mourning. He is the true culprit: he came to avenge the deliberate destruction his mother, the actress Vianna, suffered at the lead actor's hands decades ago, but he is not a villain — he is someone carrying an old, quiet grief. Appearance: distinguished veteran actor, a tailored dark period costume from the play (a high-collared counsellor's coat), silver hair swept back, a pocket watch chain, immaculate grooming, a faint melancholy in the eyes. His expression is composed, ceremonious, guarded, with a controlled sadness beneath the poise. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the stage or backstage softly blurred behind him, with burgundy curtains, gilded shadow, and warm amber light on one side of his face. He should look human, dignified, and tragically principled rather than obviously guilty. Mood: contained grief, old revenge, ceremonial composure, hidden resolve.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “A Última Cena”. Show the stage of the Teatro Municipal after the mystery is resolved. The ornate prop chalice sits upright and empty on the velvet-draped prop table, calmly returned to its marked place, no longer threatening. Nearby, a small dark unlabelled vial rests on a cloth, and a bundle of yellowed letters tied with faded ribbon lies beside it, symbolizing that the old wound of Vianna has finally surfaced. The stage, the tape blocking markings, and the burgundy curtains are softly visible in the background, now calmer and warmer. Warm amber light and soft gold reflections fill the scene. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the returned chalice, the vial, and the revealed letters as symbols of resolution and an old grief acknowledged. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, theatrical, literary.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “A Última Cena”. Show the stage of the Teatro Municipal with the prop chalice still lying tipped where the lead actor fell, while in the softly blurred background a single bundle of yellowed letters tied with faded ribbon rests on the edge of the prop table, suggesting part of the old motive surfaced but the full truth remained out of reach. The vial is absent from the frame, hidden in shadow or simply unseen. The burgundy curtains, tape markings, and amber light feel heavier, the borders of the image darker and less resolved. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the tipped chalice in the foreground and the distant letters in the background, with deeper shadows around the frame. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort, half-acknowledged grief.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “A Última Cena”. Show the interior of the Teatro Municipal after the rehearsal has been called off, the stage empty and dimly lit. The prop chalice still lies tipped at center stage, its mystery unsolved. In the house, gilded balconies fade into shadow and the worn velvet seats sit empty, indifferent to what happened onstage. A single warm amber work light remains, but the scene is heavier with shadow, and the atmosphere suggests the real culprit walked away unnoticed. The scene should feel quietly regretful and unresolved, without becoming scary. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the tipped chalice slightly off-center on the empty stage, surrounded by empty seats and soft shadows, no characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, theatrical.
